title: Zoomies
tagline: outrun the housemate, mind the furniture
description: A flappy-bird-style dash starring a black tortie cat with a bad case of the zoomies. Tap or hit space to hop over the household junk — stacked boxes, bookshelves, houseplants, hanging lamps — while a wide-eyed lilac-point Siamese tears after you from the left. One crash and you're caught.
